{{Quote|A small-time gang of thieves, the Cobral.|[[Yondalla]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:Y">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Corellian Corvette Pre-Quest: "Yondalla"}}</ref>}}
The '''Neo-Cobral''', or '''Cobral''' for short, was a criminal organization active on [[Rori/Legends|Rori]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
{{Quote|Without people like you helping, the Cobrals will eventually come up with some dastardly plan that will have all of Rori under their control.|A commoner, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ac" />}}
The organization was established by former members of [[the Cobral]], a group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Black market/Legends|black market]] [[Black marketeer|dealers]] founded by the [[Cobral family]] who took over the planetary government of the planet [[Frego]],<ref name="CDAG" /> in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]],<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. The Cobrals lost control over Frego when one of the children of the family, [[Solan Cobral]], killed his brother [[Rutin Cobral|Rutin]] to ensure his place as head of the family.<ref name="JA:TOW" /> After the Cobrals leaders were imprisoned, some of its members relocated to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of Rori which became their base of operations.<ref name="CDAG" /> Their objective was the domination of the moon.<ref name="SWG:ac" /> In addition to criminal activities, the Cobral tried desperately to get their former leaders out of [[Prison/Legends|prison]].<ref name="CDAG" />

By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Neo-Cobrals were based in a [[Cobral Hideout|bunker]] located a short distance of the city of [[Restuss]] and were led by an individual known as the [[Cobral Overlord]].<ref name="SWG:ac" /> The Neo-Cobrals were in open conflict with the [[First Brigade|Restuss Brigade]].<ref name="FS">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a commoner in [[Narmle (city)|Narmle]] intended to recruit adventurers to assault the Cobral Hideout and eliminate the Cobral Overlord.<ref name="SWG:ac" /> The same year, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Orden Tarc]] of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] tasked a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] with interrogating Neo-Cobrals at a small [[Neo-Cobral Base|base]] near [[Narmle (city)|Narmle]] for information about the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] criminal [[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]] they but did not know much about him.<ref name="SWG:RHM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Right Handless Man|Rori}}</ref>
